sub_groupings.name: Bacterial and Fungal Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections caused by bacteria and fungi, including resistant strains

sub_groupings.name: Localized and Wound-Related Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections confined to specific body sites or associated with wounds, burns, or surgical procedures

sub_groupings.name: Systemic and Bloodborne Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections affecting multiple organ systems or present in blood

sub_groupings.name: Vector-Borne and Environmental Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections transmitted by vectors or environmental exposure

sub_groupings.name: Pregnancy and Perinatal Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections affecting mother, fetus, or neonate during pregnancy or childbirth

sub_groupings.name: Immunocompromised-Associated Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections occurring in immunocompromised hosts or with opportunistic pathogens

sub_groupings.name: Respiratory and Upper Tract Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections primarily affecting respiratory system and mucous membranes

sub_groupings.name: Musculoskeletal and Bone Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections involving bones, joints, and connective tissues

sub_groupings.name: Gastrointestinal and Genitourinary Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections affecting digestive and urinary systems

sub_groupings.name: Viral and Parasitic Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections caused by viruses and parasites

sub_groupings.name: Antimicrobial-Resistant Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections with documented resistance to antimicrobial agents

sub_groupings.name: Post-Procedure and Healthcare-Associated Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections acquired during medical procedures or healthcare settings

sub_groupings.name: Uncertain Origin and Miscellaneous Infections
sub_groupings.description: Infections with unclear source or etiology

sub_groupings.name: Other Infectious Disease Disorders
sub_groupings.description: Miscellaneous infectious conditions not fitting other categories
